gherkin:
When the user clicks on the <profile> button on the left panel on the left bottom corner
Then the user should see a little pop up with their username on it
And the user should see the "Logout" button under their username
When the user clicks on the "Logout" button
Then the user should be logged out
And the user should see "Welcome to the Streaming Operator Platform In order to use the application, you will need to log in via Okta."

steps.action: *When* the user clicks on the <profile> button on the left panel on the left bottom corner
steps.result:
*Then* the user should see a little pop up with their username on it

*And* the user should see the "Logout" button under their username

steps.action: *When* the user clicks on the "Logout" button

*Then* the user should be logged out 

*And* the user should see "Welcome to the Streaming Operator Platform In order to use the application, you will need to log in via Okta."
